instruction: Generate an HTML table using Python. It should have 5 columns (name, age, country, profession and favourite food) and 10 rows with random data.
output:
Name Age Country Profession Favorite Food
John 30 USA Software Engineer Pizza
James 25 Australia Data Scientist Pancakes
Jessica 28 Canada Software Developer Sushi
